requirements.R-DIST-001: Deterministic immutable archive per canonical main update.
requirements.R-DIST-003: No dashboard, generated task/plan, populated runtime data, secret, or cache.
requirements.R-DIST-004: Release ZIP and power-dist use the same staging tree.
requirements.R-DIST-005: Install, configure, doctor, uninstall, upgrade, and rollback safely.
requirements.R-DIST-006: No GWC Gate Control in this planning package.
requirements.R-DIST-007: Five independently runnable tasks use one logical branch name.
requirements.R-DIST-008: UA uses a controlled fork/wrapper with exact upstream provenance.
